scope: HIGH severity bugs in money-critical backend services

BE-MER-002.issue: Missing Merchant ID Validation in Profile Update
BE-MER-002.description: Merchants can bypass verification by sending { isVerified: true } in request body. No whitelist of editable fields.
BE-MER-002.impact: Merchants can self-verify accounts, bypass KYC, escalate privileges
BE-MER-002.fix_required: Implement explicit whitelist of editable fields in src/routes/merchants.ts PUT /profile

BE-MER-003.description: Bank account information stored in plaintext if encryption hooks don't match field path
BE-MER-003.impact: PII leak - bank details readable in MongoDB, regulatory violation (RBI, GDPR)
BE-MER-003.fix_required: Remove bankDetails from MERCHANT_PROFILE_EDITABLE_FIELDS or ensure path matches encryption hook

BE-PAY-002.issue: Replay attack on webhook events when Redis unavailable
BE-PAY-002.description: Webhook deduplication uses Redis. When unavailable, falls back to process-scoped in-memory cache. In multi-instance production, replay guard bypassed entirely.
BE-PAY-002.impact: Duplicate coin credits or double charges if webhook replayed to fresh instance
BE-PAY-002.scenario: payment.captured webhook replayed -> two instances both mark payment completed -> wallet credited twice
BE-PAY-002.fix_required: Reject webhook with 503 when Redis unavailable, or use distributed cache with lock

BE-PAY-009.issue: Webhook handler doesn't verify payment actually paid by Razorpay
BE-PAY-009.description: handleWebhookCaptured marks payment completed based on webhook event without verifying razorpayPaymentId matches Payment record
BE-PAY-009.impact: Fake webhook with valid signature could credit wallet without actual payment
BE-PAY-009.fix_required: Fetch payment details from Razorpay API to verify status=captured and amount matches

BE-PAY-025.issue: Concurrent webhook and capture API could credit wallet twice
BE-PAY-025.description: walletCredited flag updated after transaction completes. Both webhook and capture API could enqueue wallet credit job simultaneously.
BE-PAY-025.impact: Wallet balance corruption - coins credited twice for single payment
BE-PAY-025.fix_required: Set walletCredited=true inside transaction before enqueueing wallet credit job

BE-AUTH-005.description: Two concurrent calls to verifyOTP on same phone with same OTP both pass check. Second caller increments failure counter twice.
BE-AUTH-005.impact: User locked out prematurely due to inflated failure counter on accidental double-click
BE-AUTH-005.fix_required: Increment failure counter atomically ONLY after comparison fails in Lua script

BE-AUTH-007.issue: Upsert Creates Multiple Users on Concurrent OTP Verify
BE-AUTH-007.description: Two requests verify OTP for same phone simultaneously. Both execute upsert before seeing each other's result. One user's session creation lost.
BE-AUTH-007.impact: Race condition - one user's auth session silently ignored
BE-AUTH-007.fix_required: Ensure unique index on phoneNumber, catch duplicate key errors, use matchedCount to detect new user

BE-PAY-001.issue: Floating-point precision in refund full/partial detection
BE-PAY-001.description: Refund status uses floating-point comparison. refundedAmount field has no decimal constraint. 99.999 refund treated as full if rounding differs.
BE-PAY-001.impact: Reconciliation errors - merchants see refunds marked full when partial occurred
BE-PAY-001.fix_required: Add schema validation to enforce 2 decimal place precision on refundedAmount

BE-PAY-017.description: settlementsHandler accepts req.merchantId without verifying authenticated user owns that merchant
BE-PAY-017.impact: Information disclosure - merchant can view another merchant's payment history and settlements
BE-PAY-017.fix_required: Verify req.merchantId matches authenticated merchant from JWT payload

rez-payment-service.impact: Direct payment processing, wallet credits, settlement - HIGHEST PRIORITY

rez-order-service.status: MOST FIXED - previous phase completed 11 of 13 fixes

rez-wallet-service.note: No HIGH severity - 20+ MEDIUM severity issues exist around concurrency
rez-wallet-service.impact: Wallet balance, coin ledger - MEDIUM priority

rez-finance-service.impact: BNPL, loan disbursement - CRITICAL for credit products

rez-merchant-service.impact: Merchant onboarding, KYC, profile - CRITICAL for compliance

recommended_fix_order: BE-PAY-009 (high - wallet credit without payment verification)

implementation_notes.note1: BE-MER-002 and BE-MER-003 are MOST CRITICAL - directly affect merchant verification and data security
implementation_notes.note2: BE-PAY-002, BE-PAY-009, BE-PAY-025 form a transaction safety trio - fixing all three prevents wallet corruption
implementation_notes.note3: BE-AUTH-005 and BE-AUTH-007 prevent user creation races - critical for authentication integrity
implementation_notes.note4: Gateway bugs (BE-GW-*) are infrastructure-level - affect all services
implementation_notes.note5: Many fixes are configuration or middleware-level - can be deployed independently

success_criteria.security: No replay attacks, no merchant self-verification, no unencrypted PII
success_criteria.financial: No double wallet credits, no fake payments processed, no IDOR on settlements
success_criteria.auth: No concurrent user creation races, no OTP verify races, proper error messaging
success_criteria.compliance: KYC enforcement, bank data encryption, audit trails
